title: DemosAU Federal MRP Report (Oct/Nov 2025)
desc: A comprehensive Multi-Level Regression with Poststratification model projecting seat-by-seat outcomes across Australia.

title: Into Gear: Defence Industrial Cooperation
desc: United States Studies Centre paper co-authored by Guy Boekenstein. An analysis of industrial and technology cooperation between Australia, Japan, and the United States.

title: Polling Every State, Every Quarter
desc: Ace Strategies partners with DemosAU to provide objective, timely, and reliable insights into voter sentiment as a member of the Australian Polling Council.
